setting.description: High-stakes racing within hyper-spatial vortex structures (Wormholes) across the galaxy.

mechanics.propulsion: Rolling on energy shields inside vortexes
mechanics.vortex_geometry: Three-dimensional tubes that shake, writhe, and respond to racers

lore.ftl_method: Wormholes generated between Subspace Vortex Generators

major_species.name: Humans
major_species.description: Diverse and colorful inhabitants of many worlds.

major_species.name: Theriocephalics
major_species.description: Human-animal DNA blends engineered for harsh environments.

major_species.name: The First
major_species.description: Primordial race, now extinct or ascended.

major_species.name: Draco
major_species.description: Uplifted dinosaurs created by The First.

major_species.name: Kathorri
major_species.description: Crystalline creatures living on ice worlds.

major_species.name: Vemlek
major_species.description: Artificial robotic species split by moral stances (Vemleki vs Vemleko).

major_species.name: Grenk
major_species.description: Biological servitor race with excellent memory.

leagues.name: Core League
leagues.scope: Small, nimble ships, no weaponry allowed.

intro_narrative.opening: The roar of the Vortex Generator fills the cockpit as your old, beat-up ship aligns for the jump.
intro_narrative.goal: Climb the ranks from a rookie in a backwater league to a legend in the Core League.
